mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_main (title, description, start_at, end_at, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO survey_question (survey_id, question_text, question_type, is_required, display_order, min_select, max_select, created_at) VALUES (#{surveyId}, #{questionText}, #{questionType}, #{isRequired}, #{displayOrder}, #{minSelect}, #{maxSelect}, NOW())
INSERT INTO survey_choice (question_id, choice_text, choice_value, display_order) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{choiceText}, #{choiceValue}, #{displayOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT survey_id, title, description, start_at, end_at, status FROM survey_main WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId}

SELECT question_id, survey_id, question_text, question_type, is_required, display_order, min_select, max_select, created_at FROM survey_question WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, question_id ASC

SELECT c.choice_id, c.question_id, c.choice_text, c.choice_value, c.display_order FROM survey_choice c INNER JOIN survey_question q ON q.question_id = c.question_id WHERE q.survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY c.question_id ASC, c.display_order ASC, c.choice_id ASC
SELECT survey_id, title, description, start_at, end_at, status FROM survey_main WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT choice_id, question_id, choice_text, choice_value, display_order FROM survey_choice WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY display_order ASC, choice_id ASC
SELECT survey_id, title, description, start_at, end_at, status FROM survey_main ORDER BY survey_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE survey_main SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, start_at = #{startAt}, end_at = #{endAt}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE survey_id = #{surveyId}
mapper.delete: DELETE c FROM survey_choice c INNER JOIN survey_question q ON q.question_id = c.question_id WHERE q.survey_id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT survey_id, title, description, start_at, end_at, status FROM survey_main WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY start_at DESC, survey_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_response (survey_id, member_id, respondent_key, ip_addr, user_agent, status, submitted_at) VALUES (#{surveyId}, #{memberId}, #{respondentKey}, #{ipAddr}, #{userAgent}, #{status}, NOW())

INSERT INTO survey_response_item (response_id, question_id, choice_id, answer_text, answer_number, created_at) VALUES (#{responseId}, #{questionId}, #{choiceId}, #{answerText}, #{answerNumber}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT r.response_id, r.survey_id, m.title AS survey_title, r.status, r.submitted_at, m.status AS survey_status FROM survey_response r JOIN survey_main m ON r.survey_id = m.survey_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.submitted_at DESC

SELECT response_id AS responseId, survey_id AS surveyId, member_id AS memberId, respondent_key AS respondentKey, ip_addr AS ipAddr, user_agent AS userAgent, status, submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM survey_response WHERE response_id = #{responseId}

SELECT r.response_id, r.survey_id, r.member_id, mb.login_id, mb.name, r.status, r.submitted_at FROM survey_response r JOIN member mb ON mb.member_id = r.member_id WHERE r.survey_id = #{surveyId} ORDER BY r.response_id DESC

SELECT r.response_id AS responseId, r.survey_id AS surveyId, r.member_id AS memberId, mb.login_id AS loginId, mb.name AS name, r.ip_addr AS ipAddr, r.user_agent AS userAgent, r.status AS status, r.submitted_at AS submittedAt FROM survey_response r JOIN member mb ON mb.member_id = r.member_id WHERE r.response_id = #{responseId}

SELECT item_id AS itemId, response_id AS responseId, question_id AS questionId, choice_id AS choiceId, answer_text AS answerText, answer_number AS answerNumber, created_at AS createdAt FROM survey_response_item WHERE response_id = #{responseId}
